name: Premier Gold Mines Limited
description: Premier Gold Mines Limited was a Canada-based mineral exploration and development company focused on the acquisition, exploration, and development of gold deposits in North America. The company held a portfolio of high-quality precious metal projects, including the Hardrock Project in Ontario, Canada, and the Mercedes Mine in Mexico. In 2021, Premier Gold Mines Limited was acquired by Equinox Gold Corp., with its Nevada-based assets spun out into a new entity, i-80 Gold Corp., as part of a strategic reorganization of its mining interests.
